title: Count von Count
summary: Count von Count is a Muppet character on the children's television show Sesame Street. His first appearance on the show was in the fourth season premiere in 1972, where he counts six blocks in a sketch with Bert and Ernie.
extract: Count von Count (known simply as the Count) is a Muppet character on the children's television show Sesame Street. His first appearance on the show was in the fourth season premiere in 1972, where he counts six blocks in a sketch with Bert and Ernie.
